/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,liblog.so -o liblog.so CMakeFiles/log.dir/cxxlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/lognone.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mArray.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mArray_none.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mList.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mem_management.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/memorypool.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printFunction.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printf/myPrintf.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printf/vsnprintf.c.o  -lpthread
